subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Ḥusayn! This is the Day of drawing nigh unto God, of attentiveness, of praise and glorification, and of service. God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین امروز روز اقبال و توجه و ذکر و ثنا و خدمت است انشاء الله از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
